productDisplayName: Baggit Women Jewel Baby Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap.Dimensions: 17 cm x 11 cmCreated from genuine leather and synthetic overlaysSynthetic shoulder strapFoldable flap style zippered compartmentWallet mounted onto the other side with a press button closureOne main compartment with three foldsSix card holder slots, five insert pockets, one id card holder and a zippered pocketCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
